content.content: Spanish actress who is best known for appearing in Code Name Emperor, Días mejores andThe Platform. She has also appeared on stage as Nala in the Spanish-language, Madrid production ofThe Lion King. In 2014, she made her acting debut in the television series B&b, de boca en boca. She is a co-founder of LAPU-LAPU ESTUDIO and a producer at Punisher Rabbit Producciones. Her alexandramasangkay Instagram page features career highlights and updates as well as modeling photos. She was born and raised in Barcelona, Spain. She starred alongsideGeorgina AmorósandJuan Carlos Vellidoin the movie Code Name Emperor.
